F 44

TITUSVILLE BEEF O' BRADY'S

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

Data last updated: May 6, 2026

TITUSVILLE BEEF O' BRADY'S is a American restaurant at 2825 GARDEN ST #9 in Titusville, Brevard County, in Central Florida. At its most recent health inspection on May 6, 2026, it received a grade of F with a score of 44 out of 100. The inspection noted 3 high-priority, 6 intermediate, and 14 basic violations. By health score, it is safer than 2% of Brevard County restaurants. Diners give it an average rating of 4.1 stars across 1268 reviews. Typical prices fall in the $10–20 range. Menu options are noted as suitable for dairy-free and keto diners.

Inspections trending: stable · last inspected 52 days ago

Get directions Call (321) 268-2929

Inspection history

The following records are from Florida DBPR public inspection records, most recent first.

  1. May 6, 2026 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    3 high-priority · 6 intermediate · 14 basic

    • 08 — Cross-contamination: raw foods separated; food protected during prep/storage (×2)
    • 10 — In-use food dispensing utensils properly stored
    • 12 — Handwashing; employee eating/drinking/smoking practices
    • 14 — Food-contact & nonfood-contact surfaces properly designed/maintained (×2)
    • 16 — Dishwashing facilities; sanitizer test kits; gauges
    • 22 — Food-contact surfaces clean and sanitized (×3)
    • 23 — Nonfood-contact surfaces clean (×2)
    • 29 — Plumbing installed & maintained; mop sink; backflow prevention (×2)
    • 31 — Handwash sinks accessible; handwashing supplies & sign provided (×3)
    • 36 — Floors, walls, ceilings clean & maintained; proper ventilation (×2)
    • 38 — Lighting provided; fixtures shielded or bulbs protected
    • 40 — Employee personal belongings
    • 50 — Current license, properly displayed
    • 51 — Other conditions of sanitary & safe operation

  2. December 10, 2025 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    5 high-priority · 2 intermediate · 15 basic

    • 01 — Food from approved source; safe, unadulterated, sound condition
    • 02 — Consumer advisory, date-marking & labeling of ready-to-eat foods
    • 03 — Temperature control of foods (cold/hot holding, cooking, cooling, reheating)
    • 12 — Handwashing; employee eating/drinking/smoking practices
    • 14 — Food-contact & nonfood-contact surfaces properly designed/maintained (×2)
    • 16 — Dishwashing facilities; sanitizer test kits; gauges
    • 22 — Food-contact surfaces clean and sanitized (×3)
    • 23 — Nonfood-contact surfaces clean
    • 29 — Plumbing installed & maintained; mop sink; backflow prevention (×2)
    • 31 — Handwash sinks accessible; handwashing supplies & sign provided
    • 35 — Insects/rodents/pests; outer openings protected against pests
    • 36 — Floors, walls, ceilings clean & maintained; proper ventilation (×4)
    • 38 — Lighting provided; fixtures shielded or bulbs protected
    • 40 — Employee personal belongings
    • 50 — Current license, properly displayed

  3. August 19, 2025 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    0 high-priority · 0 intermediate · 0 basic

    No violations cited.
